catalog_migration.title: Commerce Manager catalog
catalog_migration.intro_title: What is a Commerce Manager catalog?
catalog_migration.intro_desc: The Commerce Manager catalog is Meta's official catalog. Unlike the catalog created from the WhatsApp Business app, it is accessible through the API — so we can use it in your agents, tickets and campaigns.
catalog_migration.intro_diff_title: Difference with the WhatsApp Business catalog
catalog_migration.intro_diff_desc: The catalog created directly in WhatsApp Business (SMB) is not reachable through the standard API. We can't use it as-is — but we can copy its products into a Commerce Manager catalog.
catalog_migration.question: Do you already have a Commerce Manager catalog?
catalog_migration.unknown_help: No worries: a Commerce Manager catalog is free to create on Meta. In the next step we show you how to create one, then we automatically copy the products from your WhatsApp number into it.
catalog_migration.create_title: Create your catalog on Commerce Manager
catalog_migration.create_desc: Open Commerce Manager on Meta and create a new catalog (type “Products”). Then come back here to connect it — your WhatsApp products will be copied automatically.
catalog_migration.connect_desc: Connect your Commerce Manager catalog to Bedones so we can add your products to it.
catalog_migration.number_desc: Would you like to import the products from one of your WhatsApp numbers?
catalog_migration.migrate_takes_time: The import can take a few minutes. You can close this window — the migration keeps running in the background.

flow.s1_title: A catalog your tools can finally use
flow.s1_lede: Today your products live in WhatsApp Business. By moving them to a Commerce Manager catalog — Meta's official format — they become usable across all of Bedones.
flow.s1_b1_t: Your AI agent replies with your products
flow.s1_b1_b: Prices, photos and descriptions are used automatically in conversations.
flow.s1_b2_t: Tickets linked to the right items
flow.s1_b2_b: Each order attaches to the relevant products, with no manual entry.
flow.s1_b3_b: Create offers and discounts directly on your catalog items.
flow.s1_note: Your current WhatsApp catalog is not modified or deleted.
flow.s2_title: The connection happens on Meta's side
flow.s2_lede: To connect your catalog, you'll be redirected to Meta, securely. That's where it all happens — we take over right after.
flow.s2_choice1_b: If you're starting from scratch on Meta.
flow.s2_choice2_b: If you already have one in Commerce Manager.
flow.s2_note: Both choices happen on Meta. You come straight back here.
flow.s2_choose_lede: You already have one or more catalogs connected to Bedones. Reuse one or connect a new one.
flow.s2_use_connected_b: Import your products into a catalog already linked to Bedones.
flow.s2_new_catalog_b: You'll be redirected to Meta to connect or create a new one.
flow.s2_redirect_lede: We're opening Meta to connect your Commerce Manager catalog. Don't close this page.
flow.s3_lede: Start the import to move the products from your WhatsApp Business number {{number}} into this Commerce Manager catalog.
flow.s4_task3: Storing into the Commerce Manager catalog
flow.s4_caption: No need to wait here — we'll let you know once the import is done.
flow.s4_result_title: Your products are in Commerce Manager
flow.s4_ask_b: Link your number {{number}} to this new Commerce Manager catalog so the AI agent, tickets and promotions rely on it.
flow.s4_failed_hint: Please try again. If the problem persists, contact support.
flow.s5_linking_lede: We're linking your number {{number}} to your Commerce Manager catalog. It takes a few seconds.
flow.s5_linked_title: Your WhatsApp account is linked to the Commerce Manager catalog
flow.s5_linked_lede_one: Everything's set. Your {{count}} product is now available for the AI agent, tickets and promotions.
flow.s5_linked_lede_other: Everything's set. Your {{count}} products are now available for the AI agent, tickets and promotions.
flow.s5_manual_lede: Automatic connection didn't work. Link your account yourself with these steps, then re-check — we'll tell you if it's good.
flow.s5_m1_b: On your phone, or via Meta Business Suite, then go to Settings.
flow.s5_m2_b: Open the Catalog section of your account.
flow.s5_m3_b: Pick your new catalog from the list.
flow.s5_stillfailed_b: Go through the steps above again, or contact support.

help.faq_section_subtitle: Quickly find answers to your questions
help.faq_1_q: How do I connect my WhatsApp Business account?
help.faq_1_a: Go to the Messaging > WhatsApp section, then click "Connect". You will be guided through the Meta Business verification process and the connection of your WhatsApp Business number.
help.faq_2_q: How does the AI agent work?
help.faq_2_a: The AI agent automatically analyzes incoming messages and suggests relevant replies based on your product catalog, conversation history, and the rules you have configured. You can enable or disable it at any time.
help.faq_3_q: Can I manage multiple social accounts?
help.faq_3_a: Yes, Bedones allows you to connect and manage your WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok accounts simultaneously from a single interface. Each platform has its own messaging and comments section.
help.faq_4_q: How do I add members to my team?
help.faq_4_a: From the Members page, click "Add" to invite a collaborator by email. You can assign different roles (Owner, Administrator, Member) with distinct access levels.
help.faq_5_q: How do I change or cancel my subscription?
help.faq_5_a: Go to the Subscription section to view your current plan, switch plans, or manage your payment methods. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
help.faq_6_a: Absolutely. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We are GDPR compliant and never share your data with third parties without your consent. See our privacy policy for more details.
help.legal_mentions_desc: Information about the publisher, hosting, and intellectual property of the Bedones platform.
help.legal_privacy_desc: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data and that of your customers.
help.legal_conditions_desc: Subscription terms, pricing, commitments, and responsibilities related to using the service.
help.support_desc: If you haven't found the answer to your question in our FAQ, our team is here to help. Send us a message and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
help.form_description_placeholder: Describe your issue or request in detail...
help.success_message: Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you shortly.
help.blog_desc: Discover our practical articles on automation, order management, and the best strategies to grow your online business in Africa.
help.legal_section_subtitle: View legal documents related to using Bedones

dashboard.title: Overview

dashboard.comments_description: Connect your social media and let AI manage your comments for you.

dashboard.agent_description: Create an agent to manage your conversations and create tickets that will be sent to your team members.
dashboard.agent_description_2: to your team. You can also create promotions that will be taken into account by the agent.

dashboard.no_accounts_desc: Connect a social network to start managing your interactions from Bedones.

tiktok_business.description: To use TikTok direct messages, your account must be a Business account (not Creator or Personal). Follow these steps to convert it:
tiktok_business.step1_desc: Open the TikTok app → Settings and privacy → Manage account
tiktok_business.step2_desc: Tap 'Switch to Business Account' and choose a category
tiktok_business.alt_description: If the 'Switch to Business' option doesn't appear in the app, you can create a TikTok Business Center and link your account:
tiktok_business.alt_step2_desc: Create a new Business Center by choosing any country and filling in the required information
tiktok_business.alt_step3_desc: In the Business Center, go to Account → TikTok accounts and add your account. You will be asked to convert it to Business
tiktok_business.alt_step4_desc: Once the conversion is done, click 'Reconnect' below
